name: META-DB (Rei-AIOS) — Public Snapshot
description: Public snapshot of Rei-AIOS META-DB v3.0 (8-tier, all-fields knowledge infrastructure). Citation via Paper 130 DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19700758 (T1) + Paper 138 (in preparation, T7/T8).

tierDescription.tier1: World-public open problems (2615 entries) — Wikipedia / Kourovka / Erdős / Millennium / Smale / Hilbert / Green / OEIS etc.
tierDescription.tier2: Rei Invention Engine approved conjectures (15 entries) — CC-BY 4.0 attribution required
tierDescription.tier3: Claude Code research discoveries (6 entries) — subset of private META-DB. Some discoveries withheld pending Paper 135-136 publication.
tierDescription.tier4: Gaps META-DB (38 entries) — things missing from world/Rei/Claude research. GAP-A/B/C/M/P/S label system.
tierDescription.tier5: Rei-AIOS tools (7 entries) — tools Rei-AIOS has built (Rei-PL Prover, Invention Engine, NNUE D-FUMT, etc.)
tierDescription.tier6: Strategic concepts (13 entries public; some private/semi-public not included) — curricula, certifications, new-math seeds, outreach plans.
tierDescription.tier7: ★ v3.0 NEW — Latest axioms (1401 entries) across all 14 fields. D-FUMT₈ + 4-axis (X/Y/Z/T) = 2,560-dimensional evaluation. Provisional FLOWING → TRUE → SEED_KERNEL lifecycle.
tierDescription.tier8: ★ v3.0 NEW — Impossibility map (143 entries) across 5 classes (computational/logical/physical/current-limit/dfumt8-zero). Rei-AIOS's honest acknowledgment of unformalizable knowledge.

paperReference.note: Paper 130 cited totalProblems=2572 (Tier 1 at time of writing). Current public snapshot reflects disk truth + Tier 2/3 additions.

held_back_info.reason: Tier 3 entries with reiAssessment.publicExcluded=true are withheld pending scheduled paper publication.

citationPreferred: Fujimoto, N. (2026). Open Problems META-DB (Rei-AIOS). Paper 130. Zenodo. https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19700758
